description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a low-pitched, dark gable roof and prominent stone or brick columns supporting a covered front porch. The exterior walls are clad in a warm-toned masonry, giving the building a sturdy and inviting appearance. The front facade is defined by a series of evenly spaced windows and a central entrance, sheltered by the extended roof. The roof is punctuated by several chimneys and skylights, suggesting a focus on natural light and ventilation. The building sits on a paved base surrounded by a neatly trimmed lawn, with walkways leading to the entrance and around the sides. The overall design is simple yet functional, with a clear emphasis on horizontal lines and open, accessible living spaces.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, stone columns, and a covered front porch, set on a paved base with surrounding lawn. The facade features evenly spaced windows and a central entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, stone columns, central entrance, and a row of windows beneath the dark gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated shape, the depth of the roof overhang, and the paved walkway along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with additional windows and the continuation of the masonry exterior, as well as visible chimneys and skylights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end, stone columns, and the paved path leading to the rear, with the roof's features visible.
